title: borreria laevis
intro: Borreria laevis, also known as smooth buttonbush or buttonbush, is a plant species in the family Verbenaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling and fight off infections. The health benefits of Borreria laevis include its potential to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Borreria laevis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
